snippet.title: 21 Ramzan New Noha 2026 | Tumhare Baad Aey Baba | Farhan Ali Waris | Mola Ali Noha 2026 / 1447
snippet.description:
21 Ramzan Noha 2026 | Tumhare Baad Aey Baba | Farhan Ali Waris | Shahadat Mola Ali New Noha 2026

Syed Farhan Ali Waris Presents Masaib E Shahadat E Imam Ali "Jiyengi Betiyan Kaise".


Kalam Details |
Title | Tumhare Baad Aey Baba Jiyengi Betiyan Kaise
Poetry | Zeeshan Abidi
Additional Variations | SYED FARHAN ALI WARIS
Composition | Farhan Ali Waris, Mesum Zaidi & Safdar Kaleem
Chorus | Moshin Hashmi, Safdar Kaleem, Mesum Zaidi, Minhal Rizvi
Audio Recording & Mastered | Meesum Zaidi (LAWA Studio Karachi)
Video | The Focus Studio (Safdar Kaleem)
Technical Operations | Syed Muhammad Rizvi & Syed Qamber Rizvi
Special Thanks | Team FAW

Noha Lyrics |

شبِ اکیسویں رمضان اور رُخصت کا وہ منظر
علی(ع) نے الوداع بولا تو بولیں بیٹیاں روکر
بابا(ع) - بابا(ع) - بابا(ع)

تمہارے  بعد  اے  بابا   جئینگی   بیٹیاں  کیسے
کفن میں دیکھ کر چہرا  جئینگی بیٹیاں کیسے

خدا  رکھے  سلامت  بیٹیوں  پر  باپ  کا  سایہ
لپٹ  کر باپ سے زینبؑ نے  یہ  رو روکے فرمایا
رہے گا جب نہ یہ  سایہ  جئینگی  بیٹیاں کیسے


ہمیں  تم  اپنی  میت  کیلئے  رونق   نہیں بولو
ہمارےگھر کی رونق تم ہو یہ  معلوم ہے  سب کو
یہ  گھر  ہوجائیگا  سُونا جئینگی بیٹیاں کیسے


ابھی اماں کا غم بھولیں نہیں کلثومؑ  اور زینب
چلےجاؤگےتم بھی گھرسےاے باباکفن میں جب
نہ  تم ہوگے نہ ماں  زہراؑ  جئینگی بیٹیاں کیسے

کھُلا ہے زخم خوں جاری ہے اب تک آپ کےسرسے
اجازت دو تو زینبؑ باندھ دےسر اپنی چادرسے
اگر  خوں  بہہ گیا  سارا  جئینگی  بیٹیاں  کیسے

ہُوا ہے ضرب کی شدت سے  سر بابا  کا  دو پارہ
نمازی   کو مصلّے پر  لعیں  نے  اسطرح  مارا
کیوں ظالم نےنہیں سوچاجئینگی بیٹیاں کیسے

اکیلا   چھوڑکر  جانے  کی  تم  باتیں  نہیں کرنا
ہمیں  بھی ماردے گا جیتے جی ہئے باپ کا مرنا
اُٹھاکر   غم  یتیمی   کا  جئینگی  بیٹیاں کیسے

علی(ع) کا آخری سانسوں میں وہ عبّاس(ع) سے کہنے کا
میرا چہرا ہو میری بیٹیوں کے سامنے رہنا
مجھے یہ فکر ہے بیٹا جئیں گی بیٹیاں کیسے

علیؑ رخصت ہوئے ذیشان اور فرحان  روئے سب
جنازہ  اُٹھ  گیا  لیکن  وہیں  بیٹھی  رہی  زینبؑ
صدا  دیتی  رہیں  فضہؑ  جئینگی بیٹیاں کیسے

#21Ramzan #FarhanAliWaris #MolaAli #Pakistan #Noha #imammali #Nohay #Ramzan2026 #2026 #Nohay2026 #ramadan2026 #hazratali #shahadatimamali

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dUBzdswuceA

21 Ramzan Noha 2026 dedicated to the martyrdom of Maula Ali (AS), the great leader of Ahlul Bayt. This recitation remembers the tragic event in Masjid-e-Kufa when Hazrat Ali ibn Abi Talib was struck by Ibn-e-Muljim during Fajr prayer. The sorrowful day of 21 Ramadan marks the departure of the Commander of the Faithful whose life was a symbol of justice, courage and devotion to Islam.
This spiritual kalam recalls the sacrifice of the first Imam and the grief felt by believers around the world. The remembrance of Shahadat-e-Ali is observed every year in the holy month of Ramazan as lovers of Ameer-ul-Momineen gather to pay tribute to the legacy of the Lion of Allah. His teachings of truth, patience and humanity continue to guide the Ummah.
This latest Ramazan 2026 release honors the memory of the noble personality who was wounded in Kufa and later left this world on the 21st of the blessed month. The tragedy connected with Ibn Muljim remains one of the most emotional moments in Islamic history, remembered through recitations, elegies and gatherings dedicated to the virtues of Imam-e-Adil.

May Maula Keeps All Azadars Safe in Azadari Specially Juloos Youm E Ali, Majlis in the current situation of karachi / Pakistan.

Title | Tumhare Baad Aey Baba Jiyengi Betiyan Kaise
Poetry | Zeeshan Abidi
Additional Variations | SYED FARHAN ALI WARIS

Noha Lyrics |

شبِ اکیسویں رمضان اور رُخصت کا وہ منظر
علی(ع) نے الوداع بولا تو بولیں بیٹیاں روکر
بابا(ع) - بابا(ع) - بابا(ع)

تمہارے  بعد  اے  بابا   جئینگی   بیٹیاں  کیسے
کفن میں دیکھ کر چہرا  جئینگی بیٹیاں کیسے

خدا  رکھے  سلامت  بیٹیوں  پر  باپ  کا  سایہ
لپٹ  کر باپ سے زینبؑ نے  یہ  رو روکے فرمایا
رہے گا جب نہ یہ  سایہ  جئینگی  بیٹیاں کیسے


ہمیں  تم  اپنی  میت  کیلئے  رونق   نہیں بولو
ہمارےگھر کی رونق تم ہو یہ  معلوم ہے  سب کو
یہ  گھر  ہوجائیگا  سُونا جئینگی بیٹیاں کیسے


ابھی اماں کا غم بھولیں نہیں کلثومؑ  اور زینب
چلےجاؤگےتم بھی گھرسےاے باباکفن میں جب
نہ  تم ہوگے نہ ماں  زہراؑ  جئینگی بیٹیاں کیسے

کھُلا ہے زخم خوں جاری ہے اب تک آپ کےسرسے
اجازت دو تو زینبؑ باندھ دےسر اپنی چادرسے
اگر  خوں  بہہ گیا  سارا  جئینگی  بیٹیاں  کیسے

ہُوا ہے ضرب کی شدت سے  سر بابا  کا  دو پارہ
نمازی   کو مصلّے پر  لعیں  نے  اسطرح  مارا
کیوں ظالم نےنہیں سوچاجئینگی بیٹیاں کیسے

اکیلا   چھوڑکر  جانے  کی  تم  باتیں  نہیں کرنا
ہمیں  بھی ماردے گا جیتے جی ہئے باپ کا مرنا
اُٹھاکر   غم  یتیمی   کا  جئینگی  بیٹیاں کیسے

علی(ع) کا آخری سانسوں میں وہ عبّاس(ع) سے کہنے کا
میرا چہرا ہو میری بیٹیوں کے سامنے رہنا
مجھے یہ فکر ہے بیٹا جئیں گی بیٹیاں کیسے

علیؑ رخصت ہوئے ذیشان اور فرحان  روئے سب
جنازہ  اُٹھ  گیا  لیکن  وہیں  بیٹھی  رہی  زینبؑ
صدا  دیتی  رہیں  فضہؑ  جئینگی بیٹیاں کیسے

21 Ramzan Noha 2026 dedicated to the martyrdom of Maula Ali (AS), the great leader of Ahlul Bayt. This recitation remembers the tragic event in Masjid-e-Kufa when Hazrat Ali ibn Abi Talib was struck by Ibn-e-Muljim during Fajr prayer. The sorrowful day of 21 Ramadan marks the departure of the Commander of the Faithful whose life was a symbol of justice, courage and devotion to Islam.
This spiritual kalam recalls the sacrifice of the first Imam and the grief felt by believers around the world. The remembrance of Shahadat-e-Ali is observed every year in the holy month of Ramazan as lovers of Ameer-ul-Momineen gather to pay tribute to the legacy of the Lion of Allah. His teachings of truth, patience and humanity continue to guide the Ummah.
This latest Ramazan 2026 release honors the memory of the noble personality who was wounded in Kufa and later left this world on the 21st of the blessed month. The tragedy connected with Ibn Muljim remains one of the most emotional moments in Islamic history, remembered through recitations, elegies and gatherings dedicated to the virtues of Imam-e-Adil.

May Maula Keeps All Azadars Safe in Azadari Specially Juloos Youm E Ali, Majlis in the current situation of karachi / Pakistan.

"Ya Ali Ye Kya Ghazab Hua, Haye Hum Yateem Hogaye"

Ayam e Ali 2026

Topic: Shahadat Imam Ali - Maula Ali Noha

Mesum Abbas releases his latest Imam Ali Noha for 21 Ramzan 2026 titled “YA ALI HUM YATEEM HOGAYE” after Ibne Muljim Ne Haider Ko Mara Rozadaro Qayamat Ke Din Hain.

#ayyameali  #21Ramzan #MesumAbbas #NewMolaAliNoha #NohaImamAli2026

2- ROZA DARO KHAK URAO | https://youtu.be/5sTEQuMpQIg
3- QATL ALI HOGAYE RAMZAN MAIN | https://youtu.be/WpE5tt2NbWQ
4 - HAMARA PEHLA IMAM  | https://youtu.be/DkVY89nj4EA
5 - ROZADARO QAYAMAT KE DIN HAIN | https://youtu.be/fGOZaVFH7Kw
6 - ZAINAB KA BABA https://youtu.be/m5MTe8q9OZA

Noha Credits:
👉Noha: YA ALI HUM YATEEM HOGAYE
👉Reciter & Compostion: Syed Mesum Abbas 
👉Poet: Janab Zeeshan Abidi

Audio Credits:
👉Chorus: Rizwan Mirza - Hasnain Mehdi - Sunny - Shahrukh - Abbas Naqi , Kazim Nayyer
👉Audio Recording by M. Hassaan Qureshi / M. Ovais Qureshi (ODS - KHI)
👉Audio Mix/Mastered by M. Omar Qureshi (ODS - KHI)

👉DOP: Saroj Studios (NJ-USA)
👉Technical  Director & Stage Operations: James Eustace
👉Lighting Design & Systems Operations: Chris Dalagelis 
👉Edit: TNA Records
👉Post: Ali Arman Baltistani 
👉SEO Management / Coordinator / Cover Design: Yawer Abbas Damani (YAD Graphics)
👉 Social Media Management: Mussaib Sajjad (Bangalore-IND)
👉 English Translation: Ahmed Virani  (USA)
👉Matami: Anjuman e Dar e Hussain
👉Sarparast: Syed Baqar Naqvi (President: Imambargah Dar e Hussain - New Jersey, USA)

-- Lyrics --

Ya Ali (a.s) yeh kya ghazab hua, haaye hum yateem ho gaye
Saaya sar se aap ka utha, haaye yateem ho gaye

1-Hain siyah posh sogwaar
Jin ke dil mein hai Ali ka pyar
Momino ki hai yahi sada
Alvida Shah-e-Zulfiqar
Kis ne qatl aap ko kiya, haaye hum yateem ho gaye

2-Hai amaama surkh aye Imam
Ho qubool aakhri salaam
Aansoo aankh mein liye hue
Pursa de rahe hain sab ghulaam
Ghar mein bich gayi saf-e-aza, haaye hum yateem ho gaye

3-Dekha jab Hasan (a.s) ne zakhmi sar
Roye baba baba bol kar
Ibn-e-Muljim-e-laeen ne
Ek namazi roza daar par
Waar itni zor se kiya, haaye hum yateem ho gaye

4-Kehti hain Ali (a.s) ki betiyan
Aankhein kholiye aye baba jaan
Dekhenge kafan mein aap ko
Hum ne aisa socha tha kahan
Dil ko kaise chain aayega, haaye yateem ho gaye

5-Kaun pyar se bulayega
Kaun ab galay lagayega
Sar pe haath rakh ke baba jaan
Kaun humko dega ab dua
Kaise guzrega din Eid ka, haaye hum yateem ho gaye

6-Maa ke baad baap hi to tha
Jis ne humko rone na diya
Jab bhi maa ki yaad aayi to
Baba ne galay laga liya
Kaun dega humko hosla, haaye hum yateem ho gaye

7-Lipti jab janaze se behan
Bole yeh Hussain (a.s) se Hasan (a.s)
Thehar jao thori dair aur
Bandhna nahin abhi kafan
Dekhne do chehra baap ka, haaye hum yateem ho gaye

8-Jab se yeh tabeeb ne kaha
Doodh hai ilaaj marz ka
Aaye the jo pyaale thaam kar
Kaun un yateemon ko bhala
Ja ke yeh khabar sunayega, haaye hum yateem ho gaye

9-Zakhmi sar woh khoon Ya Ali (a.s)
Bhool na sakenge hum kabhi
Haan shahadat-e-Ali (a.s) ke din
Mesum aur Zeeshan Abidi
De rahe hain ro ke yeh sada

snippet.title: Sohna Nabi PBUH | Ali Zafar | Naat
snippet.description:
Sohna Nabi is not just a naat. It is an expression of love and remembrance.
We live in a time when the world feels louder, harsher, and more divided than ever before. In such moments, hearts instinctively search for something pure, something constant, something that reminds us of who we are meant to be. The life of the Beloved Prophet Muhammad ﷺ remains one of the most powerful reminders of that truth.

His message was not only spiritual, it was deeply human. In a world fractured by ego, power, and division, he taught mercy over anger, compassion over cruelty, humility over pride. The guidance he brought into the world offers a timeless roadmap for how human beings can coexist with dignity, justice, and compassion in their hearts for one another.
Centuries have passed, yet the light of that example continues to reach hearts across languages, cultures, and generations. It reminds us that the path to peace in the world begins with peace within ourselves.

Sohna Nabi is simply a reflection of that love, that reverence, and that longing that lives quietly in the hearts of millions.

Peace and blessings be upon the Beloved Prophet Muhammad ﷺ, always.

✦ Stream the HQ Audio here: https://silentroar.ffm.to/sohnanabi-az

Audio Credits:
Recited and Produced  By: Ali Zafar
Lyrics, Composition & Music Production : Hassan Badshah
Mix & Master : Irshad Shaikh
Tabla :  Aamir Ali
Dholak : Taimoor Ali Haider
Flute & Harmonium : Hassan Badshah
Guitar/Bass Guitar/Rabab :  Haider Ali
Baglama : Ustad Tanveer Hussain
Chorus : Hassan Badshah, Nasir Abbas, Raza Hussain, Irfan Ali, Awais Ali

Camera Assistant: Zain

Lyrics 

ایڈا سوہنا نبی، رب نے دوجا کوئی
Aida Sohna Nabi, Rab ne dooja koi
Such a beautiful Prophet, God has never created another

کمبلی والے دے ورگا بنونڑا نئیں
Kambli wale de warga banona nahin
Like the one who wore the blessed cloak

شاناں والے محمدؐ نوں رب نے کہا
Shaanan wale Muhammad nu Rab ne keya
God said to Muhammad (PBUH), the one of such exalted honor

تیرے باجوں نبی کوئی آؤنڑا نئیں
Tere bajon Nabi koi oana naee
After you, there will never come another Prophet

آؤنڑا نئیں
Oana naee
Will never come

چاروں پاسے ہنیرے سی ویرانیاں
Charon paase hanere si veeraniyan
There was darkness and desolation everywhere

تیرے صدقے ہوئے سارے روشن جہاں
Tere sadqe hoye saare roshan jahan
Through you, the entire world became illuminated

آکھے رب جے بڑوندا نہ تینوں نبی
Aakhe Rab je banonda na tenu Nabi
God says, if I had not made you My Prophet

فیر کجھ وی میں جگ تے بنونڑا سی نئیں، بنونڑا سی نئیں
Pher kuj vi main jag te banona si nahin
Then I would not have created this world at all

 بنونڑا سی نئیں
Banona si nahin
Would have not created it

نانا حسنین دا، بابا زہرا دا تُو
Nana Hasnain da, baba Zahra da tu
You are the grandfather of Hasan and Husain, the father of Zahra

آقا سردار مولا علی دا وی تُو
Aaqa sardar Maula Ali da vi tu
You are also the beloved leader of Maula Ali

میرا تیرے سوا کوئی سہارا نئیں
Mera tere siwa koi sahara nahin
I have no support except you

میں کسے ہور نوں دکھ سُنونڑا نئیں
Main kise hor nu dukh sunona vi nahin
Nor can I take my sorrows to anyone else

ہویا دو ٹکڑے چن وی تیرے حکم نال
Hoya do tukre chand vi tere hukm naal
Even the moon split into two by your command

پڑھدے پتھر وی کلمہ تیرے حکم نال
Parhde pathar vi kalma tere hukm naal
Even stones recited the testimony of faith by your command

سارے جگ تے جیویں رب نوں منوایا تُوں
Saare jag te jiven Rab nu manwaya tun
Just as you made the whole world recognize God

اینج ہور کسے منوونڑا سی نئیں
Enj hor kise manwaana si naee
No one else could have done so

منوونڑا سی نئیں
Manwaana si naee
Could not have made them believe

ایڈا سوہنا نبی، رب نے دوجا کوئی
Aida Sohna Nabi, Rab ne dooja koi
Such a beautiful Prophet, God has never created another

کمبلی والے دے ورگا بنونڑا نئیں
Kambli wale de warga banona nahin
Like the one who wore the blessed cloak

شاناں والے محمدؐ نوں رب نے کہا
Shaanan wale Muhammad nu Rab ne keya
God said to Muhammad (PBUH), the one of such exalted honor

تیرے باجوں نبی کوئی آؤنڑا نئیں
Tere bajon Nabi koi aona naee
After you, there will never come another Prophet

ایڈا سوہنا نبی، رب نے دوجا کوئی
Aida Sohna Nabi, Rab ne dooja koi
Such a beautiful Prophet, God has never created another

کمبلی والے دے ورگا بنونڑا نئیں
Kambli wale de warga banona nahin
Like the one who wore the blessed cloak

snippet.title: From: Season 4 Exclusive Trailer (2026) Harold Perrineau, Catalina Sandino Moreno
snippet.description:
Created by John Griffin (Crater) and executive produced by Griffin, showrunner Jeff Pinkner (Lost, Alias, Fringe) and director Jack Bender (Lost, Game of Thrones, The Institute), the series unravels the mystery of a nightmarish town that traps all those who enter. The new season will premiere Sunday, April 19 on MGM+.

In Season Four, the closer the residents of town get to the answers they seek, the more terrifying their search becomes. Who is the Man in Yellow, and what does he want? Will Jade and Tabitha’s revelation be the key to finally going home? How much longer can Boyd hold the town together, even as his body and mind are falling apart? And what role will the town’s most recent arrival play in the events to come? Season Four will open doors that some in town will end up wishing had remained closed.

The series stars Harold Perrineau (Lost) and an ensemble cast which includes Catalina Sandino Moreno (Maria Full of Grace, The Affair), Eion Bailey (Band of Brothers), Hannah Cheramy (Under Wraps, Van Helsing), Simon Webster (Strays), Ricky He (The Good Doctor), Chloe Van Landschoot (Charity, Skin), Corteon Moore (Utopia Falls), Pegah Ghafoori (The Perfect Wedding), David Alpay (Castle Rock), Elizabeth Saunders (Clarice), Avery Konrad (Honor Society), Scott McCord (East of Middle West), Nathan D. Simmons (Diggstown, This Hour Has 22 Minutes), Kaelen Ohm (Hit & Run, Eumenides Falls), Angela Moore (A Series of Unfortunate Events, Maid), A.J. Simmons (Reacher), Julia Doyle (Astrid And Lilly Save The World), Robert Joy (CSI: NY) and Samantha Brown (Y: The Last Man).

#From #IGN #TV

About:

Subedaar must now battle enemies within to protect his home and family.

snippet.title: 21 Ramzan Noha 2026 | Qayamat Eid Say Pehlay | Shahid Baltistani New Noha | Shahadat Imam Ali a.s
snippet.description:
Bismi Rabbil Hussain as 

21 Ramzan Noha 2026 | Qayamat Eid Say Pehlay | Shahid Baltistani New Noha | Shahadat Imam Ali a.s

#qamayateidsaypehlay #shahidbaltistani #21ramzannoha #shahadatimamali 

Shahid Baltistani Whatsapp Channel Link 👇

Title:
Qayamat Eid Say Pehlay | قیامت عید سے پہلے

Recited & Composed by:
Shahid Hussain Baltistani

Written By: 
Janab Zeeshan Mehdi (Skardu)
Janab Shahid Baltistani

Special thanks for Coordination: 
Kacho Basharat Skardu

Translation: 
Syed Mohsin Rizvi USA

Chorus:
Munawar Ali Khan, Rajab Ali Khan, Amanat Ali Khan, Ghulam Abbas Khan

Audio Recorded by : 
Owais Qureshi & Hassaan Qureshi - ODS Studio

Mixed and Mastered by:
Omer Qureshi - ODS Studio

Video:
TNA Production - Ali Arman Baltistani

Production Team:
Jafar Darvaish
Baqar Baltistani

Cover Designed By:
MH Creatives

Album | Ramzan Noha 2026 / 1447
Releasing Date | 7 Mar 2026

This emotional Noha “Qayamat Eid Say Pehlay” is recited by Shahid Baltistani, remembering the tragic martyrdom of Imam Ali (A.S).

On the night of 21st Ramzan, Imam Ali (A.S) was struck in Masjid-e-Kufa, and a tragedy spread through the house of Ali before the day of Eid.

Listen, share, and remember the sacrifice of Moula Ali (A.S).

Subscribe to the channel and share this Noha so the message of Ahlulbayt (A.S) reaches more people.


Lyrics:
---------
QAYAMAT EID SAY PEHLAY .!!

Ali Ke Ghar Mein Barpa Hai Qayamat, Eid Se Pehle
Hui Zainab Ke Baba Ki Shahadat, Eid Se Pehle

Ali Ke Ghar Se Le Kar Arsh Tak Bas Gham Ka Mausam Hai
Sabab Se Is Ke Ab Ramzan Bhi Mah-E-Muharram Hai
Lagi Hai Jo Sar-E-Haider Pe Zarbat, Eid Se Pehle

Janaza Uth Raha Hai Shah-E-Khaibar Geer Ka Logo
Na Poochho Haal Kya Hai Zainab-E-Dilgeer Ka Logo
Khushi Hasnain Ki Hoti Hai Gharat, Eid Se Pehle

Kaha Ashaab Ne Sar Peet Kar Hasrat Rahi Baqi
Imamat Mein Ali Ki Phir Namaz-E-Eid Parhne Ki
Qaza Ne Cheen Li Yeh Bhi Sa'adat, Eid Se Pehle

Dar-E-Zahra Jala Kar Bhi Hasad Ki Aag Baqi Hai
Humein Kya Thi Khabar Nana Sada Zainab Ki Aati Hai
Dobara Khum Ka Badla Legi Ummat, Eid Se Pehle

Ali A.S Ke Waste To Eid Masjid Mein Shahadat Thi
Mulaqat-E-Khuda Ki Is Qadar Haider Ko Thi Jaldi
Jaga Kar Khud Diya Qatil Ko Sharbat, Eid Se Pehle

Saf-E-Matam Bicha Do Sogwaro! Aaj Ghar Ghar Mein
Baha Do Apni Aankhon Ke Yeh Darya, Yaad-E-Haider Mein
Milegi Tum Ko In Ashkon Ki Qeemat, Eid Se Pehle

Ali Ko Halat-E-Roza Mein Maara Kalma Goyon Ne
Lahad Mein Bhi Muhammad Ko Sataya Kalma Goyon Ne
Rulaya Syeda Ko Zer-E-Turbat, Eid Se Pehle

Dua Maango Ke Raah-E-Hijr Mehdi Jald Khul Jaye
Ke Raaz-E-Inteqam Karbala Darvesh Khul Jaye
Mile Zeeshan Ko Bhi Yeh Basharat, Eid Se Pehle

Arif Lohar was born in 1966 in Lala Musa in Gujrat District, Punjab, Pakistan. His father was Alam Lohar, who belonged to the village of Achh in nearby Kharian Tehsil, and was a prominent folk singer.[2] Arif Lohar belongs to the Mughal Lohar Family. Arif Lohar started singing with his father and his eldest brother, Arshad Mahmood Lohar and younger brother Tariq Lohar at an early age.

He has 7 brothers named Arshad Mahmood Lohar, Khalid Mahmood Lohar, Tariq Lohar, Irfan Mahmood Lohar, Imran Mahmood Lohar, Basharat Lohar, Faisal Lohar who all live in the UK. Arif Lohar is the only one of Alam Lohar's 8 sons who lives in Pakistan along with his family.

Arif Lohar briefly went into acting in Punjabi movies before returning to his music career at the age of 22.

snippet.title: Noor | Atif Aslam & Sami Yusuf
snippet.description:
#atifaslam #samiyusuf #sufimusic #aadeez 
On November 7, 2025, a landmark moment in live music took place at the Etihad Arena in Abu Dhabi as Sami Yusuf and Atif Aslam shared a stage for the first time in their careers.

The performance marked the debut live collaboration between two of the most influential musicians of their generation. Their presentation of ‘Noor’ was a standout moment that brought together their distinct musical identities in a powerful and seamless exchange.

Joining was an ensemble of master musicians, providing rich acoustic textures from the resonant strings of the tar and santur to the expressive tones of the kamancheh that wove seamlessly with sitar and tablas to create a deeply immersive sonic landscape.The audience responded with palpable intensity, enveloped in the sound with focus and reverence, underscoring the significance of the occasion.

The brilliance of this composition lies precisely in its layering of classical Arabic praise imagery with Quranic metaphor, its recitation style evoking Turkic ceremony, its qawwali structure, and its contemporary vocal arrangement. Add to this the soaring vocals of Atif Aslam and Sami Yusuf, and the listeners know they are in front of a masterpiece.

Credits
Composer and Musical Director: Sami Yusuf
Vocalists: Atif Aslam and Sami Yusuf

Arabic: Traditional
Urdu: Ilma Qureshi

Mixed by Vishnu Rajan
Mastered by Gavin Lurssen
Video Editing & Postproduction by Omar Al Balushi @ Andante Studios

Performed by the Sami Yusuf Ensemble & Atif Aslam

Recorded live at the Etihad Arena in Abu Dhabi

©℗ 2026 Andante Records. All rights reserved.
